# Network View Improvements Checklist

Purpose: Track governance record creation before implementation for the three requested Network-view enhancements.

## Topic 1: Closest-point bond anchoring on circle nodes

- [x] Confirm problem statement and acceptance wording
- [x] Create or update requirement record
- [x] Create or update ADR record
- [x] Create backlog item and link requirement/ADR
- [x] Add verification criteria (unit/integration/E2E)
- [ ] Mark backlog status entry when implemented

## Topic 2: Direction arrows on bonds

- [x] Confirm visual style and accessibility expectations
- [x] Create or update requirement record
- [x] Create or update ADR record
- [x] Create backlog item and link requirement/ADR
- [x] Add verification criteria (unit/integration/E2E)
- [ ] Mark backlog status entry when implemented

## Topic 3: Automatic layout arrangement for Network view

- [x] Confirm layout goals (readability, stability, performance)
- [x] Decide algorithm family (force-directed vs DAG/hierarchical)
- [x] Create or update requirement record
- [x] Create or update ADR record
- [x] Create backlog item and link requirement/ADR
- [x] Add rollout/performance guardrails and verification
- [ ] Mark backlog status entry when implemented

## Cross-cutting governance traceability

- [x] Requirements index updated with any new IDs
- [x] ADR index updated with any new ADR IDs
- [x] Backlog status updated with new BI rows and status
- [x] Record links verified end-to-end (REQ <-> ADR <-> BI)
